changelog:
Fix long Claude agent and tool streams that could remain on metadata-only heartbeats and eventually exhaust the upstream retry budget. First-output timeout now requires real text, reasoning, or tool data; incomplete tool calls have a configurable assembly timeout; unlimited account polling no longer inherits the fixed upstream-attempt cap; learned endpoint affinity is preserved; split tool frames and missing final stop markers are recovered more reliably; retry errors include attempts, elapsed time, endpoint, and the last failure. Adds Web settings for maximum retry duration and tool-call assembly timeout.
修复 Claude Agent 与工具长流在只有元数据心跳时持续等待并最终耗尽上游重试预算的问题。首个输出超时现在只认可真实正文、思考内容或工具数据；未完成工具调用增加可配置的组装超时；账号持续轮询不再继承固定上游尝试次数；保留已学习的端点亲和；增强分离式工具事件及缺失最终 stop 标记的恢复；重试错误会显示尝试次数、耗时、端点和最后失败原因。Web 设置新增最大重试时长与工具调用组装超时。
